front.title: Indicating IPv6-only SVCB Endpoints and IPv4 Deprecation in the DNS

abstract.t:
As the DNS is the primary mechanism for translating from hostnames to IP addresses, it is a logical place to signal that endpoints are IPv6-only. It is thus also a logical place to signal that legacy endpoints supporting IPv4 are being deprecated. This specification introduces two SvcParams for SVCB-compatible RR types that signal IPv6-only endpoints (ipv6only) as well as deprecated endpoints (deprecated).
TO BE REMOVED: This document is being collaborated on in Github at: https://github.com/enygren/draft-nygren-dnsop-ipv6only-indicator (https://github.com/enygren/draft-nygren-dnsop-ipv6only-indicator). The most recent working version of the document, open issues, etc. should all be available there. The authors (gratefully) accept pull requests.
